text.title: api-openapi-spec Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for api-openapi-spec as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Spec exists as docs only — no mocks, no codegen, no contract tests.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Spec becomes stale; code diverges; clients break silently on next release.

failure-mode.description: Hand-editing the bundled openapi.yaml instead of source shards.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Next bundle run overwrites edits; agents lose changes.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: SDK users and LLMs learn the API shape from examples; missing examples = more support questions + hallucinated payloads.
